description: Cihaz manufacturer bilgisi — telemetry değil, cihaz kaydından gelir
label: Üretici

description: Cihaz model bilgisi — telemetry değil, cihaz kaydından gelir
label: Model

tags: rack_id: system, component: bsc, deviceId: BSC-1
component:
RackDetailModal
('Detay Göster' butonu → Genel Bilgiler sekmesi)
label: Yazılım Sürümü

description: The number of total racks in the battery section e.g.) 0x000B → 11ea
Accepted request(Conroller → BSC 40010) will be written while the request ack.(30030) is In Progress(0x0001) or Done(0x0002) If the request is not accepted or turn to None (in 30030), this value will
The value of this continually cycles from 0(zero) to 65535 with an interval of 1second.
label: Heartbeat

description: Read the BSC operation manual for more information.
label: Durum Kodu

description: The number of racks which can be charged or discharged e.g.) 0x000B → 11ea
System SOC calculated based on online racks e.g.) 0x20DA → 8410 * 0.01 = 84.10%
label: SoC (%)

description: The average SOH of all the online racks e.g.) 0x20DA → 8410 * 0.01 = 84.10%
label: SoH (%)

mapName: Anticipated BSC DC Voltage (when there is no online rack)
description: The anticipated BSC DC voltage, after racks’ contactors are closed e.g.) 0x0072 C14D → 7520589 * 0.0001 = 752.0589V
The average of voltage of all the online racks
label: Voltaj (V)

description: Total amount of DC current in the battery section
label: Akım (A)

description: The maximum power allowed to charge the battery section e.g.) 0x0001 1BC1 → 72641 * 0.001 = 72.641kW
label: Güç (kW)

description: The maximum power allowed to discharge the battery section e.g.) 0x0001 1BC1 → 72641 * 0.001 = 72.641kW
label: Deşarj Güç Limiti (kW)

description: The highest SOC (among online racks) e.g.) 0x20DA → 8410 * 0.01 = 84.10%
tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: max, deviceId: BSC-1
label: SoC (%)

tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: avg, deviceId: BSC-1
label: SoC (%)

tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: min, deviceId: BSC-1
label: SoC (%)

mapName: Rack Location of Max SOC (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the highest SOC (among online racks)
tags: aggregation: max, variant: rack_no, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Maks SOC Rack No

mapName: Rack Location of Min SOC (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the lowest SOC (among online racks)
tags: aggregation: min, variant: rack_no, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Min SOC Rack No

description: The number of online rack that require recalibration.

tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: max, deviceId: BSC-1
label: SoH (%)

tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: avg, deviceId: BSC-1
label: SoH (%)

tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: min, deviceId: BSC-1
label: SoH (%)

mapName: Rack Location of Max SOH (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the highest SOH in a rack (among online racks)
tags: aggregation: max, variant: rack_no, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Maks SOH Rack No

mapName: Rack Location of Min SOH (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the lowest SOH in a rack (among online racks)
tags: aggregation: min, variant: rack_no, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Min SOH Rack No

mapName: Max Cell Sum Voltage (among online racks)
description: The highest cell sum voltage (among online racks) e.g.) 0x0072 C14D → 752058 * 0.0001 = 752.0589V
tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: max, scope: cell_sum, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Voltaj (V)

mapName: Average Cell Sum Voltage (among online racks)
description: The average cell sum voltage (among online racks) e.g.) 0x0072 C14D → 752058 * 0.0001 = 752.0589V
tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: avg, scope: cell_sum, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Voltaj (V)

mapName: Min Cell Sum Voltage (among online racks)
description: The lowest cell sum voltage (among online racks) e.g.) 0x0072 C14D → 752058 * 0.0001 = 752.0589V
tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: min, scope: cell_sum, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Voltaj (V)

mapName: Rack Location of Max Cell Sum Voltage (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the highest cell sum voltage (among online racks)
tags: aggregation: max, variant: rack_no, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Maks Voltaj Rack No

mapName: Rack Location of Min Cell Sum Voltage (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the lowest cell sum voltage (among online racks)
tags: aggregation: min, variant: rack_no, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Min Voltaj Rack No

description: The highest current (among online racks) e.g.) 0x0001 32A1 → 78497 * 0.001 = 78.497A, 0xFFFE CD5F → -78497 * 0.001 = -78.497A
tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: max, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Akım (A)

description: The average current (among online racks) e.g.) 0x0001 32A1 → 78497 * 0.001 = 78.497A, 0xFFFE CD5F → -78497 * 0.001 = -78.497A
tags: rack_id: system, aggregation: avg, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Akım (A)

description: The lowest current (among online racks) e.g.) 0x0001 32A1 → 78497 * 0.001 = 78.497A, 0xFFFE CD5F → -78497 * 0.001 = -78.497A

label: Akım (A)

mapName: Rack Location of Max Current (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the highest current (among online racks)

label: Maks Akım Rack No

mapName: Rack Location of Min Current (among online racks)
description: The rack location that has the lowest current (among online racks)
tags: aggregation: min, variant: rack_no, deviceId: BSC-1
label: Min Akım Rack No

mapName: Selected Rack Flags in Manual Mode
description: b0: Rack#1, b1: Rack#2, … b15: Rack#16
Disabled Rack Flags : excluded from control. b0: Rack#1, b1: Rack#2, … b15: Rack#16
b0: Rack#17, b1: Rack#18, … b15: Rack#32
b0: Rack#33, b1: Rack#34, … b15: Rack#48
b0: Rack#49, b1: Rack#50, … b15: Rack#64
b0: Rack#65, b1: Rack#66, … b15: Rack#80
b0: Rack#81, b1: Rack#81, … b15: Rack#96
b0: Rack#97, b1: Rack#97, … b3: Rack#99, other bits are reserved
＊These flags will be checked and applied only when BSC initializing. Please make sure to set the flags before the Start command.
